features.name: combinational always block with case statement on opcode input
features.description: Code should include a combinational always @(*) block with a case statement that decodes an opcode input signal to generate control outputs
features.snippet:
always @(*) begin
    case (opcode)
        7'b0110011: begin branch = 1'b0; end
        default: begin branch = 1'bz; end
    endcase
end

features.name: high-impedance assignment to reg in combinational always block
features.description: Code should include an output reg signal assigned 1'bz (high-impedance) inside a combinational always @(*) default case block

features.name: multiple reg signals with high-impedance default assignment
features.description: Code should include multiple output reg signals assigned 1'bz in the default case of a combinational always block, where signals should be actively driven based on input

features.name: verilator x-assign unique with undefined case branches
features.description: Code should include a combinational always @(*) block with case statement having unhandled opcode values that default to z assignment, used with Verilator --x-assign unique compilation
features.snippet:
always @(*) begin
    case (opcode)
        default: branch = 1'bz;
    endcase
end
